modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User needs info on accessing the Clipboard in Word.

full_description_text: User asked about the Clipboard feature in Word. They want to know how to access it. This is during a call, and they seem confused. Just need basic info on it.
short_description: User needs info on accessing the Clipboard in Word.
description: User asked about the Clipboard feature in Word. They want to know how to access it. This is during a call, and they seem confused. Just need basic info on it.
